sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5886" key="a)mfi/koilos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφίκοιλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n5886.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hollowed on both sides,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> <sense n="II" id="n5886.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">doubly concave,</tr_> of a curvilinear angle, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in Euc.Def.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8p.127F.</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
